overall.description: A cinematic scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a futuristic metro train interior with cybernetically enhanced passengers. The camera captures the journey as the train travels through dark tunnels illuminated by green neon lighting and emerges into bright daylight, revealing a sprawling futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers outside the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train interior traveling through dark tunnel

events.description: light becomes visible at the end of the tunnel as the train approaches the exit

agents.ego_description: seated passenger observing the train interior and other passengers during the tunnel transit

notable_agents.action: cybernetically enhanced passenger with white mohawk and face implants examining a handheld tablet device
passenger with prosthetic arm sitting quietly on the bench looking out the window

vertical yellow handrails for standing passengers
illuminated sign showing train route information above the doors
large rectangular windows showing the dark tunnel walls outside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic metro train traveling through a dark tunnel. The interior is bathed in green neon light from overhead fixtures. A prominent passenger with a white mohawk and cybernetic implants sits in the foreground examining a tablet, while other passengers occupy the green bench seats. The train moves steadily through the enclosed tunnel with only darkness visible outside the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train traveling through bright outdoor urban environment

events.description: train exits the tunnel into bright daylight, sunlight streams through the windows illuminating the cabin
urban buildings and structures become visible through the windows as the train passes through the city

agents.ego_description: continuing the train journey as natural sunlight brightens the interior cabin

entered.detail: intense natural sunlight streaming through the train windows
futuristic city structures visible outside the train windows

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the tunnel into bright afternoon sunlight, dramatically changing the cabin lighting from green neon to a mix of natural and artificial light. Passengers remain seated as the urban landscape becomes visible through the windows, with futuristic buildings passing by. The mohawk character continues to focus on their tablet device in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train passing through tunnel with colorful neon advertisements

events.description: train enters another tunnel section with purple and pink neon lights visible through the windows
vibrant red neon structures and digital advertisements flash by outside the windows

agents.ego_description: traveling through the tunnel section with colorful exterior lighting visible through the windows

entered.detail: purple illuminated panels lining the tunnel walls
large digital billboards with pink and magenta lighting
red illuminated architectural elements in the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The train re-enters a tunnel environment where the interior returns to green neon lighting, but the exterior tunnel walls are now lined with vibrant purple, pink, and red neon advertisements and structural lighting. The colorful lights create a cyberpunk atmosphere as they flash past the windows. The train maintains steady speed through this illuminated underground section.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro train with panoramic views of futuristic cityscape

events.description: train exits the tunnel into bright daylight revealing an expansive futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers
elevated train tracks pass close to high-rise buildings and urban infrastructure

agents.ego_description: observing the sprawling futuristic cityscape through the windows as the train travels on elevated tracks

entered.detail: tall glass and steel buildings characteristic of a cyberpunk metropolis
dense urban environment visible from the elevated train tracks
clear afternoon sky visible above the city buildings

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the final tunnel section into bright daylight, revealing a breathtaking view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape. Towering skyscrapers with glass facades dominate the view as the train travels on elevated tracks. The interior mixes green artificial lighting with abundant natural sunlight, and passengers remain seated as the urban landscape streams past the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement inside a futuristic metro train that oscillates between dark, neon-lit tunnels and the blinding brightness of a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. It begins in a cabin bathed in green neon light as the train glides through a dark tunnel, focusing on a passenger with a white mohawk examining a tablet. As the train emerges into the afternoon sun, the interior lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial light while futuristic buildings flash past the windows. The scene then plunges back into a tunnel where the green interior is contrasted by vibrant purple, pink, and red neon advertisements streaming across the exterior glass. Finally, the train breaks once more into bright daylight on elevated tracks, revealing a breathtaking vista of towering glass skyscrapers under a clear sky.
